home.loadError: We couldn't load your music. Pull to refresh or try again.
home.comingSoon: No music in {{language}} yet â€” we're adding more languages soon.
home.emptyCategory: Nothing here yet â€” new music for this category is on the way.

update.title: Update available
update.message: A new version of TorahSings is available. Update for the latest features and improvements.
update.requiredMessage: A new version of TorahSings is required to continue. Please update to keep using the app.

playbackLimit.title: Daily Limit Reached
playbackLimit.message: You've reached your daily listening limit. It will reset tomorrow â€” please try again later.

artist.noAlbums: No albums available yet â€” new music from this artist is on the way.

library.title: Library
library.empty: Songs and albums you save will appear here.
library.emptyLiked: Songs you like will appear here. Tap the heart on any track to add it.
library.emptyArtists: Artists you follow will appear here. Tap follow on any artist to add them.
library.emptyPlaylists: Playlists you create will appear here.

downloads.title: Downloads
downloads.empty: Downloaded music will appear here for offline listening.

profile.title: Profile
profile.deleteMessage: This permanently deletes your account and all your data. This action cannot be undone.
profile.deletedMessage: Your account has been permanently deleted.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.instruction: Enter your current password and choose a new one (at least 8 characters).
changePassword.success: Your password has been changed. You'll stay signed in here; other devices have been signed out.
changePassword.error: Could not change your password. Please try again.

signin.title: Ready to listen?
signin.subtitle: Enter your email and password to sign in.
signin.botNotice: This page is protected to ensure you're not a bot.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Join TorahSings to save your music, build playlists, and listen anywhere.
signup.ageError: You must be at least {{age}} years old to create an account.
signup.error: Could not start sign up. Please try again.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.instruction: Enter your account email and we'll send a link to reset your password.
forgot.sentMessage: If an account exists for {{email}}, we've sent a reset link. Open it on the web to choose a new password, then come back and sign in.

twoFactor.title: Verify it's you
twoFactor.subtitle: Enter the verification code we sent to keep your account secure.

verify.title: Verify your email
verify.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to {{email}} to finish creating your account.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

playlist.emptyHint: Tap â€œAdd songsâ€ to add music to this playlist.

contributions.empty: You haven't written any reviews yet.

reviews.reviewPlaceholder: What did you think of it?
